description: Harden the MCP Context API by removing relative path resolution from __dirname and introducing a PROJECT_ROOT default to process.cwd(), ensuring robustness across different installation directories and initialization environments.
scope: Modify 'src/mcp-server/src/index.ts'. Change all usages of 'path.resolve(__dirname, "...")' to resolve against a new base directory derived from 'process.env.PROJECT_ROOT || process.cwd()'. This explicitly fixes the fragility of 'get_iteration_state', 'get_execution_diff', and 'get_dispatch_state' tools. Run integration smoke validation internally or via test-client.ts inside and outside the framework repository.
out_of_scope: Strictly NO deletion of legacy Python scripts (deprecation assessment only in M5-A). NO modifications to docs, adapter templates, or bootstrap scripts. NO implementation of state mutators or auto-approval logic.
stop_conditions: Attempting to modify any file outside allowed_files.
Attempting to delete legacy python scripts without explicit authorization.
Executing without an approved M5-B contract.
